[DQC.US.0045.6837] The concept us-gaap:OtherPaymentsToAcquireBusinesses appears in the financing cashflows of the companies cash flow statement. us-gaap:OtherPaymentsToAcquireBusinesses is an investing item and it is expected that this item would only appear in the cash flow generated from investing activities.
